programme.desc: After shattering the box office with a global gross of $292M and becoming Blumhouse's highest-grossing film ever, Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria is reopening its doors. programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: It’s Kate’s birthday and everyone in the habitat has something amazing planned- but Melman’s worried that his homemade/hoof-made gift won’t measure up. programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Gloria becomes determined to earn her Queen of Kindness Kidizen badge and welcomes some free-spirited rats who need a place to stay into the habitat. Despite her discomfort, Gloria encourages the rats to make themselves at home. When the rats play with her special baby tusk at the bottom of her tank, she finally snaps and sends the rats home. It isn't until the gang winds up at the rats' nest and Gloria almost takes a slice of the rats special cheese that she learns it's okay to say no.

programme.desc: When Grug thinks his forehead looks too big in Ugga's family portrait, she strives to make the painting disappear.

Meanwhile;Tim does everything he can to avoid doing his homework.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Alex and Eugene find themselves at odds with Tom and their fellow dragon riders when Feathers and Webmaster go missing during a blizzard in the Ice Realm.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret “Echo” Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

programme.desc: When Gran's cane and Sandy's bear go missing in the middle of the night, Eep chases down every clue to the first-ever mystery to find the thief.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales
programme.desc: While riding back to Miradero, the girls get lost -- and Abigail's horse gets bitten by a snake! Can an old friend's skills help save the day?

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales
programme.desc: After finding a majestic horse in the wild, Lucky and the girls set out to solve the mystery of where she came from -- and where she truly belongs.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: The Dinotrux investigate when all of the other trux in the crater start running away from a mysterious mountain that may be coming alive.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Revenge of the Creature Catcher Casper, Mantha and Ra accidentally lead Jimmy's father to the underworld.Slugby. To prove that the teachers haven't gone soft, Alder and Dash stage a Slugby match.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: You Oughta Be in Pictures When Mantha sees a Deedstown mob attacking a group of fellow zombies, she's determined to lead them in a counterattack. Crypt Critters Mantha comes down with an embarrassing case of crypt critters, but refuses to go to the nurse.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Whilst down at the stream with Rupert and Co, the fox twins mis-read the words to one of Ping Pong's spells which causes everyone to shrink. Delighted with their new size and ignoring warnings from Rupert, the twins leap into their toy boat and immediately sail into danger. Can Rupert, Ping Pong, Edward and Bill rescue them before they capsize or drift under the bridge and out to sea?

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert tries to help Ming to fly by attaching a balloon to him. But the wind blows and Ming is carried away. Rupert and Bill try and chase after Ming, while Ping Pong, unaware of what's going on, works with Edward and Raggety to make a proper flying spell for baby dragons. This is soon abandoned though when Ming is blown out to sea, and Rupert has to come and asking Pong for help. The friends leap in the flying car and chase after Ming, as she floats helplessly around Nutwood. Finally, its Raggety's magic that saves the day, and Ming is safely rescued. The friends agree to wait until Ming's older before helping her to fly… and give her an airborne ride in Rupert's flying car instead!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelps learns about memory spark in an attempt to relive a memory of his grandmother. / Kelp and the underwater gang put on a show to showcase their imaginary sparks. As she practices, however, Scallop becomes convinced her tusk has a real spark!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it “the Kelp way.”

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a coin purse with kitty coins, it's Store Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy help out at all the different stores (Cakey's Bakery, Baby Box's Craft Emporium, Kitty Fairy's Flower Shoppe) to earn kitty coins and save up for a melodicat at the Grand Opening of DJ Catnip’s Music Store!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy and the Gabby Cats prepare for a sleepover in the Garden, they discover Pillow Cat has never been to a sleepover. They help her conquer her fears and enjoy her first sleepover.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When their favorite zoo visitor loses his teddy bear, our gang goes on a wild adventure through New York City to return it to him - and in the process Marty learns that some things in life can't be found in an instruction manual.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Melman finds a lucky flower and is convinced that today will be his Best Day Ever! But when a series of unlucky events threaten to ruin his day, he’s faced with the choice to drown in his sorrows or “take back the day”!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelps learns about memory spark in an attempt to relive a memory of his grandmother. / Kelp and the underwater gang put on a show to showcase their imaginary sparks. As she practices, however, Scallop becomes convinced her tusk has a real spark!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it “the Kelp way.”

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Mr. Tanaka adopts an unruly dog at Sam’s behest, the Zenkos have the job of training the mischievous mutt and turning him into man’s best friend material. / When Ellie's friend Maria is late submitting her painting to the art show, it’s up to the Zenkos to get inside the community center after hours, avoiding overzealous junior security Rodney, and get Maria’s painting on display before the show starts.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: After Lula loses her loose tooth in the park, Team Zenko must find the missing molar and get it under Lula’s pillow in time for the Tooth Fairy’s visit. / Gabriel and Luis show off their new drone but it crash lands on the roof top. Team Zenko's mission is to try and get it back, but Yolanda won't give up her new hi-tech friend that easily.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Alex realizes he’s too small to climb onto his new habitat “stage”, he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a big, new roller coaster at Coney Island and figures if he can ride the big coaster, that’ll prove that he’s a BIG deal! But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Undercover Chef - Korea
programme.desc: Top celebrity chefs go undercover as a junior kitchen staff in the very country that shaped their culinary roots, challenge to earn recognition from locals in 5 days!

programme.title: Yumi's Cells 3
programme.desc: Yu-mi, a bestselling novelist, meets her new editor Soon-rok. With her Love Cell still asleep from heartbreak, his quiet charm stirs something new. Could he be her long awaited endgame?

programme.title: Six Singles Under One Roof
programme.desc: Six single celebrities in their 40s choose co-living in Gugi-dong as “Life Mates,” sharing laughter, challenges, and fresh memories while redefining modern family through friendship.

programme.title: Six Singles Under One Roof
programme.desc: Six single celebrities in their 40s choose co-living in Gugi-dong as “Life Mates,” sharing laughter, challenges, and fresh memories while redefining modern family through friendship.

programme.title: Rented in Finland
programme.desc: Lee Je-hoon, Lee Dong-hwi, Cha Eun-woo, and Kwak Dong-yeon will leave their urban lives behind to experience the serene and picturesque rural life in Finland.

programme.title: KILL IT: Style Creator Showdown

programme.title: Expedition X (S6)
programme.desc: Phil and Heather board the USS Hornet, a haunted WWII aircraft carrier, and explore its eerie decks guarded by sailors beyond the grave.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S2)
programme.desc: Cody and Dave take on a survival scenario in South Africa's backcountry where dehydration kills in hours and hungry super-predators kill even faster.

programme.title: Shark Week: Jaws Vs The Meg
programme.desc: The massive meg shark was once feared as the most fearsome predator. But new evidence suggests that its cousin, the great white shark, may have caused its extinction.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Ant rescues a 1971 Mk1 Ford Transit that was once a German fire engine, but it won't start or stop. Disaster strikes the farmhouse restoration.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (Season 18b) (S18)
programme.desc: Mike finds an Alfa Romeo GTV with some fails, but he reckons Elvis can sort it. Can he get it ready for an Italian road trip to re-create the GTV Cup?

programme.title: Mike Brewer: Born Dealer (S1)
programme.desc: Mike Brewer tests the market with a customised pick-up. Mrs. Brewer hatches an expansion plan, and the team take on an 1980s hot hatch restoration.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: The Great Eight_S2 (S2)
programme.desc: Racers line up in Tulsa, Oklahoma, for the fifth week of the Great 8 - and everyone's gunning for Kye. Changing temperatures challenge the drivers.

programme.title: Kindig Customs (S10)
programme.desc: The Bronco's owner is unsure about Dave's radical idea for the interior. He has to make his client happy but resist going too far with this build.

programme.title: Road Rage (S2)
programme.desc: A mum defends her kid from a group of bikers. A deranged driver repeatedly rams another motorist. A driver defends himself from aggressive motorists.

programme.title: Road Rage (S2)
programme.desc: A group of women gets into a gigantic brawl in a Florida intersection. A motorcycle causes a massive accident. A man ploughs through a parade route.

programme.title: Battle Of Little Bighorn: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: Don Wildman climbs onto the saddle to investigate what really happened on the day of the biggest defeat in US military history.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: In the remote Altai Mountains, Otto Karasch learns how to hunt birds of prey. He and his companion must find suitable mounts for their daring journey.

programme.title: Kindig Customs (S10)
programme.desc: KevDogg and Dave take the rig to the Triple Crown of Rodding show in Nashville. They check out the local builds and get into some shenanigans.

programme.desc: Pineapple argues with a woman who has a "hall pass" from her husband. Jeremy gets in a fight, and Elmer hunts for a massive haul.

programme.desc: Facing sub-zero temperatures, they make their way down a jagged ice waterfall, build a snow cave and try to salvage a dead elk carcass.

programme.title: Kindig Customs (S10)
programme.desc: KevDogg and Dave take the rig to the Triple Crown of Rodding show in Nashville. They check out the local builds and get into some shenanigans.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Ant finds a rare 1978 TVR Taimar in an Oxfordshire Garden. Despite oil leaks, dodgy paint and a missing heater box, he's hooked.

programme.title: Mike Brewer: Born Dealer (S1)
programme.desc: Mike trades a classic Citroen for an F-Type Jag. Later, he visits a classic car auction to test the market and tries his hand at Crown Green Bowls.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Locals Only (S2)
programme.desc: Locals in Ohio compete for $5,000 and a chance to take on Street Outlaw Doc for another $5,000. And a small-tyre racer is racing for a cause.

programme.title: Anchors Aweigh
programme.desc: Two sailors (Sinatra and Kelly) in Hollywood looking for glamorous movie starlets find romance, dance with a cartoon mouse and help a young starlet get discovered--all during one shore leave.

programme.title: Rear Window
programme.desc: When professional photographer J.B. “Jeff” Jeffries is confined to a wheelchair, he becomes obsessed with watching the private dramas of his neighbours play out across the courtyard.

programme.title: Hellboy II: The Golden Army
programme.desc: Prince Nuada wishes to animate the Golden Army, a lethal bunch of fighting machines, to conquer the world by ruining the human race. But Hellboy and his allies try to prevent the prince from winning.

programme.title: For a few Dollars More
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood is the "Man With No Name," who teams up with equally lethal Lee Van Cleef in pursuit of a sadistic killer and his band of desperadoes in this non-stop action classic.

programme.title: Anchors Aweigh

programme.title: Seven Brides For Seven Brothers
programme.desc: A frontier bride is stunned to find her husband’s six wild brothers. Determined to civilize them, she sparks a hilarious, song-filled battle of the sexes in this classic Western musical.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Take an unforgettable, uniquely magical journey through director Tim Burton's deliciously delightful, whimsically wonderful world of Charlie And The Chocolate Factory.

programme.title: Psycho
programme.desc: A Phoenix secretary embezzles $40,000 from her employer's client, goes on the run, and checks into a remote motel run by a young man under the domination of his mother.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Ginormica, The Missing Link, Insectosaurous and B.O.B. join forces to fight back when aliens attack. Featuring Reese Witherspoon, Seth Rogen, Hugh Laurie and Will Arnett.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 85
programme.desc: The Great Nyonya Cook-Off begins disastrously when Aunty Lee is disqualified before the competition even heats up. Can the gang help her reclaim her reputation — and prove who the real master chef is?

programme.title: CSI: Vegas S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Facing an existential threat that could bring down the Crime Lab, a brilliant team of forensic investigators must welcome back old friends and deploy new techniques to preserve and serve justice in Sin City.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 154
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: The Cube Australia - EP 6
programme.desc: Hosted by Andy Lee,, The Cube Australia sees competing pairs have nine lives to complete seven games, each worth an increasing amount of money, as they move closer to the huge jackpot. With key moments filmed using state-of-the-art bullet time’ 3D time-freezing technology, it is more than a regular game show. It brings blockbuster visuals and Hollywood high tension direct to your living room. Will anyone have what it takes to beat the Cube?

programme.title: Raid The Cage: Season 02 - EP 8
programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: Films & Stars - EP 11

programme.title: The Contenders 26 - EP 22

The tsunami came carrying a horrifying 9 Richter magnitude scale.

programme.title: Tekan Minyak - EP 10
